---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap/click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem. Please blur out any real member names, amounts, or other sensitive community data before posting.

**Environment**
- Device: [e.g. Android phone, desktop browser]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari]
- App version / commit: [see the footer of the app, or `git log -1`]
- Deployment type: [Docker on Oracle Cloud VM / other]

**Which screen/feature does this affect?**
Reference the relevant section of [`docs/APP_FLOW.md`](../../docs/APP_FLOW.md) if you can (e.g., "§3 Add Contribution").

**Additional context**
Anything else that might help — was this a one-off, does it happen every time, did it start after an upgrade, etc.

---
Found a security vulnerability instead? Please don't file it here — see [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md).
